name: Baazeem Trading Co.
summary: Baazeem Trading Co. operates as a FMCG distribution company. The company offers household cleaning solutions, such as sponge, scrubbers, steel wool, brooms, wipers, trash bags, food storage bags, table covers, and others; liquid detergents; cleaners; tuna; starch sprays; plastic oven bags; toilet cleaning products; and bed linens. It sells its products through business to business, discount store, and wholesale and retail channels in the United Arab Emirates, the Kingdom of Bahrain, and the Sultanate of Oman. The company was founded in 1978 and is headquartered in Riyadh, Saudi Arabia.
